name: Custom avatar URL
description: Let members set an HTTPS avatar URL on their profile (operator allowlist). Falls back to Gravatar/identicon when empty.

settings_schema.label: Allowed image hosts
settings_schema.description: One hostname per line (e.g. cdn.example.com). Optional prefix *.example.com for subdomains. Empty list blocks all custom URLs until configured.

settings_schema.label: Members can set a URL
settings_schema.description: When off, only staff can change avatar URLs (field still shown if they have a URL).
